---
title: "Community of St. Mary the Virgin, Wantage, The"
---

## Community of St. Mary the Virgin, Wantage, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This sisterhood was founded by the Rev. [[person:244]W. J. Butler] in 1848.  CMY became an Associate, as did many members of the Gosling Society. The community still exists and its website is http://orders.anglican.org/arcyb/csmv.html

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
